chapter_title.en: Chapter 81 – Understanding the ‘الْجَوَادِ’ benevolence and ‘السَّخَاءِ’ the generousity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/169)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/169)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يُؤْتَى يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ بِرَجُلٍ فَيُقَالُ احْتَجَّ فَيَقُولُ يَا رَبِّ خَلَقْتَنِي وَ هَدَيْتَنِي فَأَوْسَعْتَ عَلَيَّ فَلَمْ أَزَلْ أُوسِعُ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ وَ أُيَسِّرُ عَلَيْهِمْ لِكَيْ تَنْشُرَ عَلَيَّ هَذَا الْيَوْمَ رَحْمَتَكَ وَ تُيَسِّرَهُ فَيَقُولُ الرَّبُّ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُهُ وَ تَعَالَى ذِكْرُهُ صَدَقَ عَبْدِي أَدْخِلُوهُ الْجَنَّةَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyd, from Abu Al Hassan Ali Bin Yahya, from Ayoub Bin Ayn, from Abu Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘They would come with a man on the Day of Judgement, so it would be said to him: ‘Present your argument’. So he would be saying: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! You<sup>azwj</sup> Created me and Guided me, so You Expanded (the sustenance) upon me, so I did not cease to extend upon Your<sup>azwj</sup> creatures and being lenient upon them so that You<sup>azwj</sup> would Extend Your<sup>azwj</sup> Mercy upon me on this Day and be Lenient with me’. So the Lord<sup>azwj</sup>, Majestic is His<sup>azwj</sup> Extollation, and Exalted is His<sup>azwj</sup> Mention, would be Saying: “My<sup>azwj</sup> servant speaks truthfully. Enter him into the Paradise”’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa ibn ‘Ubayd from abu al-Hassan, Ali ibn Yahya from Ayyub ibn ‘A’yan from abu Hamzah who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘On the Day of Judgment a man will be brought and will be told to present his argument to support his merits. He will say,
